title: US Open Badminton: Tanvi Sharma, Kidambi Srikanth Advance as Indians Make Winning Start
indian_angle: Tanvi Sharma, Kidambi Srikanth, and Devika Sihag all advanced to the second round, marking a strong start for Indian shuttlers at the US Open.
summary: Indian shuttlers Tanvi Sharma, Kidambi Srikanth, and Devika Sihag secured straight-game victories in their opening matches at the US Open, successfully advancing to the second round of the tournament.

title: BAI Issues Advisory on Unauthorized Badminton Leagues and Tournaments
indian_angle: Badminton Association of India (BAI) has issued an advisory to protect players and officials from unauthorized leagues and tournaments operating within India.
summary: The Badminton Association of India (BAI) released an advisory warning against participation in unauthorized badminton leagues, tournaments, and championships, including 'Passion Sphere presents Badminton Premier League – Season 2' and '4th Drops & Drives Badminton Tournament', to ensure proper regulation and player welfare.

title: Addendum to Selection Criteria for Badminton Asia U17 & U15 Junior Championships
indian_angle: This addendum details the revised selection criteria for Indian junior players aiming to compete in the upcoming Badminton Asia U17 & U15 Junior Championships 2026.
summary: The Badminton Association of India (BAI) has published a further addendum to the selection criteria for the Badminton Asia U17 & U15 Junior Championships 2026, outlining updated guidelines for junior players aspiring to represent India.

title: PV Sindhu's Early Steps to Stardom Explored in Macau Feature
indian_angle: This feature explores the early career of Indian badminton star PV Sindhu, highlighting her foundational experiences in Macau.
summary: A new feature article delves into the formative years of Indian badminton sensation PV Sindhu, tracing her initial steps on the path to stardom during her time competing in Macau.

title: Coaches Development Program for Grassroot Level Commences in Guwahati & Raipur
indian_angle: The Badminton Association of India is conducting a Coaches Development Program at the grassroot level in NCE Guwahati & Raipur, crucial for nurturing future Indian talent.
summary: The Badminton Association of India (BAI) has circulated details for a Coaches Development Program at the grassroot level, scheduled from July 15th to 24th, 2026, in NCE Guwahati and Raipur, aimed at enhancing coaching standards across India.

title: Expression of Interest Invited for BWF World Championships 2026 Hosting
indian_angle: The Badminton Association of India (BAI) has issued an Expression of Interest for hosting the prestigious BWF World Championships 2026, indicating India's ambition to stage a major global badminton event.
summary: The Badminton Association of India (BAI) has released an Expression of Interest (EOI) for potential hosts of the BWF World Championships 2026, signaling the country's intent to bring the premier international tournament to India.
